message:
feat(education): Add InfectionCycleVisualizer component

Interactive animated visualization of the phage infection cycle for
beginner mode education. Features:

- Two pathways: Lytic cycle (attachment → lysis) and Lysogenic cycle
  (integration → induction)
- Timeline scrubber for stage-by-stage exploration
- Animated SVG diagrams for each stage:
  - Attachment: tail fibers binding receptors
  - Injection: DNA entering host
  - Decision: lytic/lysogenic switch
  - Takeover/Replication/Assembly/Lysis (lytic)
  - Integration/Prophage/Induction (lysogenic)
- Key learning points for each stage
- Play/Pause/Step controls
- Pathway toggle button
- Responsive layout with theme integration

Follows existing TranslationVisualizer patterns for consistency.

Closes phage_explorer-l3q6

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
